facebook.content:
"But he answered, 'I will not be your king. The Lord alone will be your king.'" 1 Samuel 12:12

When we say "not my king" to the status quo, the voices of negativity, or the systems that seek to control us, we're making a powerful declaration of faith. We're placing our trust in the authority of the Kingdom of Heaven, not the kingdom of this world. What kingdom are you saying "yes" or "no" to today?

instagram.content:
"Mark 11:24: Therefore I tell you, what you pray for, believe that you have received it, and it will be yours.

This scripture isn't just for the faint of heart, it's for the bold and fearless who know they have authority in the Kingdom. 

Who are you believing for today?

tiktok.content:
Luke 10:19 - "Behold, I give unto you power to tread on serpents and scorpions, and over all the power of the enemy: and nothing shall by any means hurt you." 

The enemy's power over your life is not a reality. You have the power to tread on his attacks. But will you operate in that power today?
